title: Feedback - back button
scenario: Back button in Feedback section of App Settings does not return user to Menu screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) or navigate to App Settings.
4. Press the Back button (either the system back button or the in-app back arrow).
5. (Alternative scenario) Enter feedback text, name, and email in the respective fields.
6. Tap the Send button to submit the feedback.
7. Press the Back button (either the system back button or the in-app back arrow).
expected: In both scenarios, pressing the Back button returns the user to the Menu screen.
